title: senecio muliensis
intro: Senecio muliensis, also known as Tuber Senecio, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio muliensis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be made into a tincture or powder for use in herbal remedies.
